summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of WhatsApp Business API inbox UI. All 12 required features tested successfully with 100% pass rate. 3-panel layout, conversation management, chat interface, lead management, and real-time polling all working perfectly.
passed_tests: Conversation list panel loads and shows 4 conversations correctly
Search conversations by name and phone number working perfectly
Filter conversations by lead status (all 5 status options functional)
Click conversation to open chat - navigation working seamlessly
Chat messages display correctly with proper alignment (inbound left, outbound right)
Message input field and send button work with proper state management
Lead details sidebar shows complete contact information
Lead status dropdown works and updates status (tested 'contacted' status change)
Agent assignment dropdown shows 2 agents and assigns successfully
Tag management fully functional (add/remove tags working)
Polling updates active (5-second interval for conversations, 3-second for messages)
Empty states display correctly when no conversation selected
Enter key functionality for sending messages
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
success_percentage: Frontend: 100% (16/16 tests passed including additional functionality tests)
